title: Aai Tuljabhavani
desc: A gleeful Tuljabhavani accepts Mahadev's marriage proposal. Simultaneously, Shumbha decides to target Mahadev's weakness.

title: Jai Jai Swami Samarth
desc: A revered religious leader appears in Akkalkot, Maharashtra, and through his teachings guides his devotees towards the path of righteousness.

title: Mohini - Premachi Filmy Kahaani
desc: Mahendra decides to accompany Mohini to Amarapur to protect her. Later, when the driver does not show up, Mohini decides to drive the bus.

title: Mi Jinkun Ghein Saara
desc: Chhavi gives her approval regarding Saket's future bride. Later, an excited Aniket gives Saket ideas for a perfect proposal.
